title: Dutch National Flag Rearrangement with Rotating

statement.markdown:
Given an array of integers, rearrange it in the Dutch national flag order (0s to the left, 1s in the middle, and 2s to the right) with the additional constraint that the 0s must appear in the first 1/3 of the array, 1s in the next 1/3, and 2s in the last 1/3. If the array cannot be rearranged according to these constraints, return an empty array.

Your code should be able to handle an array of any size, but it should work efficiently.

Example constraints: For an array of size 6, the expected result would be [0,0,0,1,1,2].
statement.outputFormat: A rearranged array of integers or an empty array if the constraints cannot be satisfied.
statement.notes: You can use any algorithmic approach you like, but your solution should be correct and efficient.

examples.explanation: Rearranges the array in the Dutch national flag order with the additional constraint that the 0s appear in the first 1/3 of the array, 1s in the next 1/3, and 2s in the last 1/3.
